## Summary

What changed and why?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation

## Validation

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --all`

## Performance Impact

- [ ] No expected impact
- [ ] Improves latency/throughput
- [ ] Potential regression (explain below)

Notes:

## Privacy / Security Impact

- [ ] No impact
- [ ] Impact exists (explain below)

Notes:

## UI Changes (if applicable)

- [ ] Screenshots attached

## Checklist

- [ ] Keeps offline-first behavior by default
- [ ] Keeps privacy defaults intact
- [ ] Updated docs if behavior changed
